# Development guide title

## Scope

State which contributor task or policy this guide owns.

## Policy

Define repository rules and their rationale.
Link exact commands, schemas, and product contracts from their reference or specification owners instead of reproducing them here.

## Workflow

Give the supported commands and sequence from the project root.

## Validation

Define the completion gate and platform-specific requirements.

## Troubleshooting

Cover repository and tooling failure modes.

## Related documents

Link product contracts and other contributor guidance.
